title: [run-regression-suite] Aggregate failure: run regression suite (0/19 scenario checks failed) on n/a — aggregate finding across endpoints — expected All 19 'run regression suite' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour, observed [api-tester-run-regression-suite] quality outcome=FAIL; metric=7.14 (undocumented)
expected: All 19 'run regression suite' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour

testing_steps: 1. Start the target API at http://localhost:8899.
2. Write a script that replays every request in Postman/collection.json against http://localhost:8899 and diffs each status+body against the recorded expected values.
3. Any case that previously passed and now fails is the regression.
4. Compare your script's failures with the per-scenario evidence in TestCases/run-regression-suite/cases.json — this run recorded 0 of 19 checks failing.

The per-scenario evidence is in TestCases/run-regression-suite/cases.json. There is no single reproducible API call — reproduce it with the script described in the steps below (which is also why this bug has no Postman section).
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Start the target API at http://localhost:8899.
2. Write a script that replays every request in Postman/collection.json against http://localhost:8899 and diffs each status+body against the recorded expected values.
3. Any case that previously passed and now fails is the regression.
4. Compare your script's failures with the per-scenario evidence in TestCases/run-regression-suite/cases.json — this run recorded 0 of 19 checks failing.
